info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to hurt to strike
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: 6.77 tfnhU~ ityasya ayaM pAWaBedaH sidDAntakOmudyAM pAWitaH nAsti parantu kzIrataraNgiRyAM dfSyate
